name: Can I do GEO myself, or do I need an expert?
description: You can handle basic GEO internally if you can edit content and schema, but experts help when the site is large or highly competitive.

mainEntity.name: Can I do GEO myself, or do I need an expert?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can do basic GEO yourself if you already control the website and can edit content, headings, and schema. A specialist becomes more useful when you need to scale across many pages, fix technical issues, or compete in a crowded category. For a small site, a disciplined internal process is often enough to start.
acceptedAnswer.description: You can handle basic GEO internally if you can edit content and schema, but experts help when the site is large or highly competitive.
